talk_metadata.session_title: Advanced Antibody Conjugate and Targeted Therapeutic Platforms
talk_metadata.talk_title: The SynthBody Platform: A multifunctional, multivalent, multispecific antibody drug conjugate platform
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: 'we use this as essentially our North Star'
Speaker said: 'if you're going to only pay attention to a single slide in the entire talk, this is the one to pay attention to'
Speaker said: 'we can make synbodies that have absolutely terrible PK, but we've also learned to make these molecules with really excellent PK'

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Lack of high-density antigen expression (unlike HER2) and failure to utilize cooperative binding to increase internalization and payload delivery

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker claims traditional ADCs are limited by a lack of 'combinatorial synthetic targets' and lack the geometric reach to organize proteins not in proximity
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Reliance on single-target expression levels rather than multi-tiered logic gate control

key_data_gaps: No long-term toxicity data beyond basic body weight loss in animals

crispro_opportunity.description: Developing multi-tiered logic-gated ADCs to simulate 'HER2-high' expression levels on targets with lower density
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: we could create a novel platform that would essentially create combinatorial synthetic targets to behave like HER2 high
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: Use computational spine to identify optimal combinatorial target sets and geometric configurations for logic-gated binding
external_validation_needed: PubMed: cooperative binding kinetics of multivalent VHH constructs

cited_competitors.name: belantamab
cited_competitors.context: Used as a benchmark for potency and toxicity (ocular tox)

cited_competitors.name: polatuzumab
cited_competitors.context: Used as a benchmark for CD79B targeting

unresolved_questions: How to ensure non-immunogenicity of complex multivalent constructs in humans

talk_metadata.session_title: Advanced Antibody Conjugate and Targeted Therapeutic Platforms
talk_metadata.talk_title: M7437: A novel anti-LY6E ADC using a Top1 inhibitor payload
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: 'we may not have to rely on a biomarker-based patient stratification or selection'
Speaker said: 'it's a bit difficult to discriminate how much would be added on from the LY6E expression' (regarding bone marrow tox)

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Potential for target-mediated drug disposition (TMDD) due to LY6E expression on NK and B cells
vulnerability_identified.hidden_tox_signal: Hematological toxicities (lymphocytes, neutrophils, reticulocytes) observed in cynomolgus monkeys

trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: LY6E expression levels (speaker suggests they may not be needed)

key_data_gaps: No data on LY6E knockout phenotype in bone marrow

crispro_opportunity.description: Identifying the exact threshold of LY6E expression required for efficacy to avoid 'unselected' trial failure
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: this indicates the potential for an unselected approach and that we may not have to rely on a biomarker-based patient stratification
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: Analyze PDX and patient data to define a precise LY6E expression cutoff for response

cited_competitors.name: 9b12 MMAE
cited_competitors.context: Benchmark molecule; M7437 showed superior activity

cited_competitors.name: DATO-DXd
cited_competitors.context: Compared in SCLC/squamous models; M7437 showed superior activity

cited_competitors.name: Enhertu / T-DXd
cited_competitors.context: M7437 showed efficacy in a model with primary resistance to Enhertu

unresolved_questions: Whether bone marrow toxicity is driven by LY6E expression on immune cells or the exatecan payload itself

talk_metadata.session_title: Advanced Antibody Conjugate and Targeted Therapeutic Platforms
talk_metadata.talk_title: Preclinical evaluation of target-mediated clearance and alternative payloads in cadherin 17-directed antibody drug conjugates
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: 'we got an early signal in patients that we started to see higher than expected... clearance'
Speaker said: 'unfortunately, we saw the exact same effect' (regarding payload switch not fixing PK)

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Target-mediated clearance (TMC) due to high expression of Cadherin 17 in normal colon and small intestine (antigen sink)
P-gp efflux pumps in colorectal cancer cells actively remove MMAE, rendering the ADC inactive

key_data_gaps: Lack of human P-gp expression data to validate payload choice

crispro_opportunity.description: Overcoming P-gp mediated resistance in CRC by switching to Top1 inhibitors (exatecan)
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: in this environment of high P-gp expressing colorectal cancer models, exetecan or topoisomerase inhibitors like exetecan would be the way to go
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: Use P-gp expression as a predictive biomarker to stratify patients for Top1 vs MMAE payloads
external_validation_needed: PubMed: P-gp expression levels in CRC subtypes

unresolved_questions: How to mitigate the fundamental PK liability imposed by the tissue sink of Cadherin 17 in normal gut tissue

talk_metadata.session_title: Advanced Antibody Conjugate and Targeted Therapeutic Platforms
talk_metadata.talk_title: Nuzepha (nuzephatide pepidotin): A bicycle drug conjugate targeting EphA2
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: 'the preliminary safety profile is completely differentiated from previous FA2 targeting conjugates'
Speaker said: 'I think that the demonstration is that half-life is adequate'

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Antibodies have long half-lives and poor penetration, leading to systemic toxicity (coagulopathy/hemorrhage) and narrow therapeutic windows
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Maintaining high systemic concentrations of antibody-based ADCs increases toxicity risk

key_data_gaps: Limited data on long-term durability of response

crispro_opportunity.description: Using small bicyclic peptides to achieve rapid tumor penetration and fast renal clearance to widen the therapeutic window
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: a very short delivery... enables you really to open that window between efficacy and toxicity
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: Computational design of high-affinity bicyclic peptides for targets where antibody-based ADCs are too toxic
external_validation_needed: PubMed: PK of bicyclic peptides vs antibodies in solid tumors

cited_competitors.name: EphA2 antibody-based conjugates
cited_competitors.context: Mentioned as having significant hematological toxicity (coagulopathy, hemorrhage)

unresolved_questions: Whether episodic delivery is sufficient for all EphA2-expressing tumor types
